privacy_policy_page.service_description: Gegmio LLC (“Gegmio”, “we”, “our”, or “us”) operates the Gegmio mobile application, the Gegmio website (gegmio.com), and related services including business management tools (collectively referred to as the “Service”).
privacy_policy_page.privacy_policy_description: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our Service. It is governed by the Personal Data Protection Law of Georgia.
privacy_policy_page.privacy_policy_agreement: By accessing or using the Service, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.
privacy_policy_page.account_creation_collection: When you create an account, we may collect:
privacy_policy_page.account_info_usage: This information is used to create and manage your account and provide access to platform features.
privacy_policy_page.business_profile_intro: Businesses registered on Gegmio may provide:
privacy_policy_page.business_info_usage: This information is publicly visible within the platform to allow users to discover and contact businesses.
privacy_policy_page.location_information_text_1: With your permission, Gegmio may access your device location to show nearby businesses, calculate distances, and improve search results.
privacy_policy_page.location_information_text_2: You may disable location access at any time through your device settings. Precise location history is not stored on our servers.
privacy_policy_page.device_and_technical_information_intro: When you use the Service we may automatically collect:
privacy_policy_page.basic_usage_data: Basic usage data (screens visited, session duration)
privacy_policy_page.technical_info_usage: This data is used to maintain platform stability and improve the user experience.
privacy_policy_page.use_info_provide_platform: Provide and operate the Gegmio platform
privacy_policy_page.business_analytics_intro: Businesses can view aggregated analytics such as:
privacy_policy_page.analytics_usage_info: This analytics data is aggregated and does not identify individual users.
privacy_policy_page.click_to_call_text: Gegmio allows users to call businesses directly by tapping a phone number. This opens your device's dialer. Gegmio does not record or store call information.
privacy_policy_page.push_notifications_text: With your consent, Gegmio may send notifications related to platform updates, nearby places, and service alerts. You may disable them in device settings.
privacy_policy_page.sharing_information_text: We do not sell, rent, or trade personal data. Information may be shared only when required to operate the service or comply with Georgian law.
privacy_policy_page.third_party_services_text: The platform uses services such as Google Maps for location and mapping functionality.
privacy_policy_page.your_rights_intro: Under Georgian law you have the right to:
